title: ZA/UM studio, creator of Disco Elysium, announces new layoffs after poor performance of Zero Parades
summary: The company plans to cut up to 32 jobs after failing to meet expected sales of its latest title.

title: Marathon director Joe Ziegler leaves Bungie at a turbulent time for the studio
summary: The departure comes just one month after massive layoffs at Bungie.

title: Specialized media publish their weekly columns on what they are playing
summary: The editors of the main portals share their games and recommendations of the week.

title: Baldur's Gate 3 actress Jennifer English cancels her next project due to health issues
summary: The voice of Shadowheart withdraws from a new fantasy game to prioritize her well-being.

title: Wuthering Waves announces anime series titled 'Elysium'
summary: Kuro Games expands its universe with an animated adaptation of its successful RPG.

title: Christopher Nolan and his adaptation of 'The Odyssey' dominate the film news
summary: The media analyze the film, recommend lists of related games and series, and debate the director's creative decisions.

title: Todd Howard denies grudge against Obsidian and avoids talking about exclusivity of Fallout and Elder Scrolls
summary: The head of Bethesda assures that it is too early to decide the future of the franchises on other platforms.

title: Valve rules out exclusives for its Steam Machines and defends the PC catalog as its great asset
summary: The company considers that open platform games are its true launch strength.

title: New details about Nintendo Switch 2: from patents to sales and game analysis
summary: The console's current news includes an innovative patent, its file sizes, and the best-selling titles on eShop.

title: Magic: The Gathering reveals 35 cards from 'The Hobbit' and its complete roadmap for 2027
summary: The Universes Beyond collection continues to grow with Middle-earth, while the annual release calendar is revealed.

title: Pokémon Go: controversy over an exclusive Mewtwo and guide for the anniversary Pikachu celebration
summary: While scalpers resell tickets at exorbitant prices, players prepare for the special event.

title: Valve warns that RAM prices will not stop rising and that the situation is getting worse
summary: The company describes the memory market as 'lagging' and assures that prices will continue their upward trend.

title: Square Enix commemorates 25 years of Final Fantasy X and defends the legacy of Dirge of Cerberus
summary: Two looks at the Japanese company's past review one of its most beloved titles and its strangest experiment.

title: Disney criticized for its use of AI and for a curious Mandela effect in its logo
summary: The company faces controversies over its policy on AI-generated content and a viral debate about its iconic logo.

summary: The indie farming universe announces collaborations and a spin-off that mixes its essence with deck-building mechanics.

title: Amazon's God of War live-action series will replace Kratos due to an injury during filming
summary: The adaptation of the popular video game suffers a last-minute change in its main cast.

title: GameStop acquires nearly 10% of eBay in a hostile acquisition move that baffles the market
summary: The video game chain executes an unprecedented financial operation that no one quite understands.

title: Marvel's move to Los Angeles after 87 years in New York marks the end of an era in comics
summary: The publisher leaves its historic headquarters, forever changing the landscape of the comic book industry in the United States.

title: Blizzard corrects course and reverses the most hated changes of the new Diablo 4 season
summary: The company acknowledges the error of its update and releases a patch that undoes almost all the new features to calm the community.

title: Zelda remake rumors keep fans on edge awaiting an official announcement
summary: The Nintendo community is in turmoil over persistent leaks about a new version of a classic title.
